title: only I was
content:
only I was
aware

Double edged
This time
One play
Each other’s way
Separate
Separate

————————————————————————————
WHEN IM WITH

High up above
Where clouds meet eyes
And eyes are deceived
A bond is born
Between space
And time
Thrust up
Break through
With wings Of metal
Or wax Or the like
Or whatever you got
Carry on into night
Then day once again
Carry on until the weight gets light
Friends may carry knives
Foes may carry feathers
Don’t matter now
Sail on
High up above those who walk
Sail until the fabric fraught
Till the ship sinks
Until water fills the lungs
And the last gasp
